pageCode.description: Required field -Unique identifier refers to payment mathod

transactionTypeId.description:
Required field - 
Credit card=1
Bit=6
Google Pay=14
Apple Pay=13

sum.description: Required field - Sum from server notification

firstPaymentSum.description: Required field - The first payment to pay in a multiple payments transaction

periodicalPaymentSum.description: Required field - The amount of each payment after the first payment in a multiple payments transaction

allPaymentsNum.description: Required field -Total number of payments to be made

asmachta.description: Required field -An approval from the credit card company for the payment

description.description: Required field- Description of the product to be charged (will appear in the details of the transaction as well) Example: Payment for a monthly subscription.

fullName.description: Required field -Full name must consist of at least two names.

payerPhone.description: Required field -A valid israeli mobile phone numebr Example: 0500000000

cardSuffix.description: Required field -Last 4 credit card digits from server notification

cardBrand.description: Required field -The card's brand from server notification

cardBrandCode.description:
Required field -
Mastercard=2
Visa=3
Isracard=5
Diners=8
Discover=7

cardExp.description: Required field -Card expiration date from server notification

userId.description: Required field -Unique identifier refers to payment mathod

sum.description: Required field -Total amount for payment Example: 10.99.

productData[0][catalogNumber].description: optional -catalog number for an item in the Invoice

productData[0][quantity].description: optional -quantity for an item in the Invoice

productData[0][price].description: optional -price for an item in the Invoice

productData[0][itemDescription].description: optional -item description for an item in the Invoice

pageField[invoiceName].description: optional - the name for the invoice

pageField[invoiceLicenseNumber].description: optional - Invoice License Number for invoice

pageCode.description: Required field -Unique identifier refers to payment mathod

userId.description: Required field -Unique identifier refers to every business that is connected and uses Grow payments solutions.

sum.description: Required field -Total amount for payment Example: 10.99.

successUrl.description:
Required field -An after payment "Thank you" URL. make sure to use HTTPS and not HTTP. Must use an external URL and not localhost. Example: https://mysite.co.il?success=true

Do not include special characters in this field.

cancelUrl.description:
Required field -The page users will be redirected to if a payment is cancelled.

Do not include special characters in this field.

maxPaymentNum.description:
optional -the customer can choose number of payments between 2- to the value that you choose in this parameter.
The payments number must be minimum 2
Determine Restricting the number of payments

description.description:
Required field -Description of the product to be charged (will appear in the details of the transaction as well) Example: Payment for a monthly subscription.

Do not include special characters in this field.

pageField[invoiceName].description: optional - the name for the invoice

pageField[invoiceLicenseNumber].description: optional - Invoice License Number for invoice

pageField[fullName].description: Required field -Full name must consist of at least two names.

pageField[phone].description: Required field -A valid israeli mobile phone numebr Example: 0500000000

cField1.description:
optional -Custom field, you may add up to 9 fields.

Do not include special characters in this field.

cField2.description:
optional -Custom field, you may add up to 9 fields.

Do not include special characters in this field.

saveCardToken.description:
optional -if set to 1: the token of client credit card will be sent after payment for running future tokenization payments . 
if you set 0 the token of client credit card wil not be saved .

productData[0][price].description: optional -price for an item in the Invoice

productData[0][itemDescription].description: optional -item description for an item in the Invoice

notifyUrl.description:
optional -Url for server to sever request

Do not include special characters in this field.
notifyUrl.example: Url for server to sever request

optional - Url for invoice
